g.text: A0/A3 exit gate -- required status check on main
filter by design. A required status check must
filter causes non-matching PRs to be
"Expected - Waiting for status to be reported."
Never re-add paths: here unless this check is
A0 gate: required fields, enums, GHCR ref
PR merge to main is unblocked</size>
targets main; gates ALL pull_request events
validate | ubuntu-latest | timeout 5 min | permissions: contents read
